svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="a01-four-phase-handler" name="four-phase-handler"> <mxGraphModel dx="-384" dy="-218" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" background="#fbfaf7" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="none"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="req" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#5d665d;dashed=1;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;" value="HTTP request
path params · query · body — all raw text" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="260" x="74" y="24" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="txn" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#d9ded5;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=4;fontColor=#5d665d;fontSize=10;" value="inside PostgreSQL — one transaction" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="546" width="660" x="30" y="112" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="handler" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eaf1e7;strokeColor=#143d2b;verticalAlign=top;align=right;spacingRight=10;spacingTop=6;fontColor=#143d2b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="handler — one function, every exit is a RETURN " vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="330" width="612" x="54" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="1 · materialize
safe-cast every input: text → typed, garbage → NULL" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="260" x="74" y="176" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="2 · validate
required fields present, optional well-formed" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="260" x="74" y="248" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="3 · probe
target exists · reference exists · no conflict" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="260" x="74" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="4 · execute
call the kernel, map row / NULL to the response" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="260" x="74" y="392" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rail" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;" value="structured error RETURNs
application/problem+json (RFC 9457)
machine-readable code · no schema leakage" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="216" x="426" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ok" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="RETURN 200
row as JSON" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="216" x="426" y="398" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kernel" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d9f4e8;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="kernel — owns the atomic mutation
row lock and/or guard predicate · returns row or NULL" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="300" x="74" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cli" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fdf3e7;strokeColor=#b45309;dashed=1;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;" value="40001 · 40P01 propagate uncaught, SQLSTATE intact →
the client that owns BEGIN retries the whole transaction" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="440" x="134" y="700" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e0" edge="1" parent="1" source="req" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#143d2b;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="p1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="p1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#143d2b;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="p2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="p2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#143d2b;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="p3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="p3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#143d2b;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="p4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ecall" edge="1" parent="1" source="p4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#5d665d;fontSize=10;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;entryX=0.25;entryY=0;" target="kernel" value="call"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eret" edge="1" parent="1" source="kernel" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#5d665d;fontSize=10;exitX=0.75;exitY=0;entryX=0.75;entryY=1;" target="p4" value="row or NULL"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="er1" edge="1" parent="1" source="p1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#5d665d;fontSize=10;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.1;" target="rail" value="400 · 422"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.4" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="er2" edge="1" parent="1" source="p2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#5d665d;fontSize=10;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="rail" value="400 · 422"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.4" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="er3" edge="1" parent="1" source="p3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#5d665d;fontSize=10;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.9;verticalAlign=bottom;" target="rail" value="404 · 422 · 409"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.2" y="-6" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="er4" edge="1" parent="1" source="p4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#5d665d;fontSize=10;exitX=0.85;exitY=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;" target="rail" value="NULL → 404 · 409"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.45" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="295" y="380" /> <mxPoint x="534" y="380" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eok" edge="1" parent="1" source="p4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#5d665d;fontSize=10;exitX=1;exitY=0.7;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="ok" value="row → 200"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.4" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ebypass" edge="1" parent="1" source="kernel" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#b45309;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;exitX=0.4;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="cli"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
